channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Bahay ni Teddy Corpuz sa Quezon City, binahaan ng kawatan; CCTV footage natanggalag
item.description: Ang bahay ni Teddy Corpuz, sikat na host ng “It's Showtime” at lead vocalist ng banda Rocksteddy, sa Quezon City ang pinasukan at ninakawan ng isang kawatan isang linggo na nakalipas. Batay sa CCTV fo...

item.title: Alex Eala Adapts to Clay Court and Advances in 2026 Italian Open
item.description: Filipino tennis star Alex Eala is making significant strides on the clay courts of the 2026 Italian Open in Rome. The young athlete, who recently secured her first career win at this prestigious WTA 1...

item.title: Canadian Natural Resources Reports Stronger First-Quarter Profit Driven by Increased Output
item.description: Canadian Natural Resources Ltd., Canada’s largest oil and gas producer, announced better-than-expected financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The company reported an adjusted profit of $1.17...

item.title: UN and Pakistani Officials Stress Climate Action and Inclusion of Women and Youth
item.description: The second edition of the Breathe Pakistan International Climate Change Conference took place in Islamabad, bringing together policymakers, experts, and stakeholders to discuss the urgent climate chal...

item.title: Top law firms challenge BBBEE Legal Sector Code in North Gauteng High Court
item.description: The North Gauteng High Court in Pretoria is currently hearing a significant case where major South African law firms are challenging the Broad-Based Black Economic Empowerment (BBBEE) Legal Sector Cod...

item.title: Fire causes damage at east-end Ottawa spa
item.description: A fire broke out at a spa located in Ottawa’s east end early on May 7, 2026, causing significant damage to the facility. Fire crews were dispatched promptly to the scene and were able to contain the b...

item.title: Omoku Sets Up ICT Centre To Boost Youth Digital Skills
item.description: Omoku town for Ogba/Egbema/Ndoni Local Government Area don plan to get proper ICT Centre wey go help bridge di digital gap for di community. Dis project dey led by Omoku People’s Forum, wey get member...

item.title: Europe opens first large-scale sanctuary for captive elephants in Portugal
item.description: Europe has welcomed its first large-scale elephant sanctuary in Portugal, offering a natural and secure home for animals previously held in captivity. Julie, the last circus elephant in Portugal, and ...

item.title: Bunda Street in Civic set for major dining upgrades
item.description: Bunda Street in Canberra's Civic precinct is undergoing a significant transformation, evolving into a vibrant dining hub. The Canberra Centre is welcoming a variety of new venues, ranging from high-en...

item.title: Gachagua Confirms Opposition to Present One Presidential Candidate Against Ruto
item.description: DCP leader Rigathi Gachagua has reiterated that the United Opposition will field a single presidential candidate to take on President William Ruto in the upcoming elections. Speaking in Gatanga, Muran...

item.title: Genesis AI launches versatile robot model and dexterous human-like robotic hand for industrial use
item.description: A French robotics startup, Genesis AI, has introduced a new artificial intelligence model called GENE-26.5 along with a highly dexterous robotic hand designed to perform complex and delicate tasks. Ba...

item.title: Bihar Cabinet Reshuffle Sees 32 New Ministers, Including Nitish Kumar's Son Nishant
item.description: The Bihar government witnessed a major cabinet reshuffle today, with Chief Minister Nitish Kumar inducting 32 new ministers into his cabinet. Among the new appointees is Nishant Kumar, the son of the ...

item.title: Canada Deploys Counter-Drone Systems to Protect Military Bases Amid Legal Challenges
item.description: Canada’s military is quietly deploying counter-drone systems at major ports and air bases to address evolving aerial threats and draw lessons from Ukraine's use of drones in its conflict with Russia. ...

item.title: Douglas Ogutu’s Journey from Street Performances in Nakuru to Studying and Showcasing Music in the UK
item.description: Douglas Ogutu, popularly known as Vema, has gone from performing outside supermarkets in Nakuru to showcasing his talent on international stages. In 2025, he moved to the UK under the prestigious Chev...

item.title: Local elections 2026: Labour faces potential losses in Wales and across UK councils
item.description: Millions of voters across the United Kingdom headed to the polls on Thursday for local councils in England, as well as for the Scottish and Welsh parliaments. These elections are viewed as the first s...

item.title: British expedition guide hospitalised following hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship
item.description: A British expedition guide, Martin Anstee, aged 56, is currently isolating in a hospital in the Netherlands after being evacuated from the MV Hondius, a cruise ship affected by a hantavirus outbreak. ...

item.title: Russia and Ukraine exchanges deadly attacks despite temporary truce
item.description: Just hours after Ukraine announced a unilateral ceasefire, Russia launched a wave of drone and missile attacks, highlighting the fragility of temporary pauses in the ongoing conflict. Several civilian...

item.title: Three Women Linked to Islamic State Arrested Upon Returning to Australia Alongside Their Children
item.description: Three women with links to the Islamic State have been taken into custody by Australian authorities after arriving in Sydney and Melbourne. They face serious charges including crimes against humanity, ...

item.title: Readers respond to Australia's best movies list and share everyday tips in Column 8
item.description: In this edition of Column 8, readers share their thoughts on various light-hearted topics. Nola Tucker's criticism of the Herald’s list of Australia’s best movies has sparked responses from several re...

item.title: Lani Misalucha Releases New Single Inspired by Her Love Story
item.description: Filipino music icon Lani Misalucha has released her latest single entitled 'Punong Matibay', a heartfelt song that draws inspiration from her personal love journey. Known for her powerful vocals and e...
